content.query:
SELECT
    LOWER(cst.FirstName) first_name,
    LOWER(cst.LastName) last_name,
    cst.phone phone,
    cst.email email,
    cst.address1,
    cst.city,
    cst.state as xstate,
    cst.zip as zipp,
    brn.longname as market,
    lds.division
FROM
    [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job on cst.CustomerID = job.CustomerID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jbs on jbs.JobStatusID =  job.JobStatusID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn on lds.BranchID = brn.BranchID
WHERE lds.EntryDate BETWEEN '2022/07/25 00:00:00' AND '2023/07/25 00:00:00'
AND lds.sold = 1


select top(100) * from [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
